'''Micro-pulse blasters''' were a form of [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] weapons used during the time of the [[Dark Wars]]. The weapon worked by firing short controlled bursts of coherent energy rather than a fully powered energy blast. The weapons were usually created from [[thoranium]], allowing them to release more powerful discharges than standard blasters, even larger [[Blaster rifle/Legends|rifles]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
